publicationPrinciple: Only source-linked, bounded reviewed, navigation or explicit source-register records are displayed. A listed collection is not a claim that every verse or recording is published.

collections.author: அருணகிரிநாதர் / Arunagirinathar
collections.summary: Search the currently verified full Tamil song records, including Muththaiththaru and reviewed Tirupparankundram songs.

collections.author: தேவராய சுவாமிகள் / Devaraya Swamigal — attribution requires edition-level confirmation
collections.summary: A source-controlled structural edition links to the reviewed opening extract; a complete critical edition is not claimed.

collections.author: ஸ்ரீமத் சத்குரு சாந்தானந்த சுவாமிகள் — source boundary retained
collections.summary: A source-checked opening extract is available with device read-aloud; complete-text and recording rights remain under review.

collections.author: அருணகிரிநாதர் / Arunagirinathar
collections.summary: The opening protection verse and first verse are source-controlled; copyrighted modern commentary is not reproduced.

collections.author: அருணகிரிநாதர் / Arunagirinathar
collections.summary: The literary identity is registered, while a complete verified primary-text edition is still required.

collections.author: அருணகிரிநாதர் / Arunagirinathar
collections.summary: The work and linked-verse structure are registered; verified complete verse text is not yet published.

collections.author: Work-level attribution under editorial review
collections.summary: The work is registered without publishing an unverified complete text or unlicensed recording.

collections.author: Edition and authorship boundary retained
collections.summary: The source and structural record is available; the complete text and human recording require verification and rights clearance.

collections.author: அருணகிரிநாதர் / Arunagirinathar — edition verification required
collections.summary: Vel and Mayil companion-work records are available without publishing unverified complete verses.

collections.author: நக்கீரர் / Nakkirar
collections.summary: Navigate source-linked sections associated with Murugan's sacred landscapes; the navigator does not claim a complete critical-text edition.

collections.author: Traditional and attributed works
collections.summary: Browse mantras, Gayatri prayers, reviewed extracts and clearly labelled source-review records.

collections.author: Rights-controlled audio catalogue
collections.summary: Use available device read-aloud items and review recording-rights status. Unlicensed human recordings are not published.
